summary: Auto-Learning Threat Detection & Investor Deck Update Testing - Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Investor Deck verified with all new features present.

issues: Text says '21 critical capabilities' but array has 20 features - minor text/code mismatch

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: COMPARISON_FEATURES array has 20 items but text says '21 capabilities' - consider updating text to '20' or adding one more feature
seed_data_creation: Used existing ceremony IDs for threat analysis testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Threat learning endpoints fully tested. All 4 endpoints work: GET /api/threat-learning/analytics, GET /api/threat-learning/patterns, GET /api/threat-learning/analyses, POST /api/threat-learning/analyze/{ceremony_id}. Feature gate (fraud_intelligence) blocks free users with 403. Admin bypasses gates. Auto-learning runs after ceremony execution. Investor Deck has 19 slides with all new features: HTS Tokenized Escrow (slide 10), Auto-Learning Threat Detection, Subscription Paywall. Competitive matrix has 20 features including HTS Tokenized Escrow, Auto-Learning Threat Detection, Freelancer Templates.
